reviews.review_description: I don't agree with all the bad reviews. Gets me moving and the music is decent.  Just too lackluster on features and content.  Hardly any backgrounds to pick from and a hand full of outfits and songs " even counting dlc content". If there was more content it would be better. The game pace is good for old farts like me that play time to time.
Of course the anime idol moves away from you when you miss 1 beat. This is beat saber if it was a 45 year old mid life crisis with no women or kids edition

reviews.review_title: Great Game For Kizuna AI Fans
reviews.review_description: This game is really fun. I saw many reviews complaining that most of the songs were locked behind DLC, but you can buy all the DLC in one purchase for $40 because this "DLC" is actually the full game. This is the only platform you can try the game for free before you buy the rest. People need to understand that the full game has always been $40 on literally every other platform. But if you're not sure you'll like the game, try out this free demo first. I've been enjoying it so much, and I plan on buying the full game today after I get paid.

super cute game of course!! even when i’m doing terrible i feel like i’m succeeding because the game is just … SO CUTE!!!!!!!!! but u gotta pay 4 EVERY SONG, and every song is 2-3$… not very fun… :( 
u do get 2 free songs i guess, and the game is very fun, but it feels like a rip-off… i’ll still pay 4 the songs tho bc i like the game enough :-) 
if u don’t like dlc-focused games, however, this game is most certainly not 4 u!

For those defending this game because it's "free", I've no ideacwhat you consider a full game.. 
For free you only get 2 songs and the tutorial, making the free base game nothingbut a demo (which in itselfis fine, but not a reasonto defend it's more lackluster aspects) Then it's $2.99+ per song or $36+ to buy them all together (with more to com, meaningeven more money going out in the future) which STILL amounts to less content & cost more than say Beat Saber even without it's DLC songs. The gameplay isn't even quite as smooth.
So all in all this game is just made to rip off the hardcore weebs (and I even say that as a huge anime fan myself) that are going to throw money at this slop built around over-pricing practices.

I downloaded this game (since I was looking for a rhythm game and can't afford beat saber) and I was suspicious of it while reading the reviews, thinking it was a mindless game that's not fun at all, but I was wrong(ish) it's fun but mindless. There's only a tutorial and 2 songs, not to mention to get the rest you have to pay 30+ dollars!? That's just disappointing. My suggestion is to add an extreme difficulty more free songs and glowstick skins. Thank you for reading!

questo gioco non è mai stato bello, praticamente è inutile perché il movimento non è allineato con la musica e i suoni generati disturbano la musica, durante il gioco Kizuna che canta nessuno la guarda perché il giocatore è concentrato a guardare gli elementi che deve colpire, ma anche per come vengono colpiti non è soddisfacente, è tutto il gameplay che non funziona, sarebbe da rifare un nuovo gameplay!

perché invece 3 stelle? è soltanto grazie a Kizuna che è carina da vedere, (altrimenti darei tranquillamente una stella)
Kizuna è bella da vedere sia che si tratti nei video 3D sia che si tratti nell'esecuzioni di ballo. E a proposito i video 3D potrebbero essere sicuramente meglio a livello di risoluzione. 

ora questo gioco potrebbe migliorare soltanto se:

-rivoluzionate completamente il gameplay 

-aggiungete la modalità mixed reality per vedere Kizuna in casa propria 

-migliorate la qualità dei video 3D 


vi auguro di riuscire a fare almeno una di queste tre cose, grazie!

Note: it's a fun game but I have a few iffs. First of, I can only play 3 songs for free and have to buy packs to play others. 2. After you play those songs over and over again it can get kinda annoying. 3. It's a bit of an arm workout lol, but maybe I'm just lazy. But other than those it's a fun game to play when bored.

reviews.review_title: Kinda weird but the music is good
reviews.review_description: So like I said the music is pretty good (the girls voice does get kinda annoying) but it’s ok. Now the weird part is and hear me out, you hit the blocks TO MAKE THE GIRL GET CLOSER TO YOU? Who thought this was a good idea? Anyways that is my review.
I’m in love with the girl 😍💖💞

Nice
This game makes me wonder how lonely I am

I follow Kizuna AI's YouTube channel so I know what she's about. Although I don't understand her, the subtitle translation for her songs is excellently done. As for Kizuna AI-touch the beat. Just wow for me as I personally love her music and being able to watch Kizuna sing and dance in front of me while hitting the notes with my glow sticks is just amazing. You get two free songs to start with, with others you can buy as add ons (£15) which is worth it in my eyes. With more songs on the way soon, I can't wait to buy them. If you love rhythm games and anime you'll definitely love Kizuna AI-touch the beat. Note: difficulty going from easy to normal is substantial so god only knows what hard mode is going to be like as I haven't tried it yet lol. I do get the impression beat saber fans try other rhythm games so they can say it's rubbish and leave bad reviews. I personally found beat saber boring. But, different strokes and all. Give Kizuna AI a go and judge for yourself.

Just don’t get it and can’t figure out how to delete it out my library!

reviews.review_description: The game play is rlly good not as good as beat saber that's for sure but it has 2 amazing songs and levels with an adjustable difficulty making you able to play the same level with out getting bored plus there's a vtuber so yeah really underrated in my opinion but you will be dreanched in so much sweat while playing this as it makes you move over all rlly good game
Cute and super Fun!

I was skeptical to buy it but its fun and so cute. Dont get it if you're not an anime fan. It reminds me of a dance game I used to play on the first playstation. Now on vr it is amazing in my eyes. It has different difficulty levels so I don't get bored but ha these songs are so fun and anime like I never get bored. Plus its a great exercise.
Well, I like the concept. Vtuver, anime , music... The game is not bad, not good... BUT FREE!  So, for the anime's fans, it worth installing it!
